do_not_merge.reason: Strong identity field service_variant differs: local vs sbs. Test 1 (contradiction test) forces do_not_merge.

rationale: The B46 local and SBS records have clearly different service_variants (local vs sbs), so they cannot merge per test 1. The record route_b46-local-limited-20110915 lacks a service_variant and its evidence mentions both local and limited services, making its variant undetermined. Per route per-kind rules, a record with no determinable variant is ambiguous and cannot be merged with any single-variant record. The lifecycle aliases within each record (date/source suffixes) are already consolidated into their respective base records and require no further merge groups across the three primary records.
